briefs.title: Section 29 of BC Liquor Control and Licensing Regulation Repealed Effective December 8, 2025
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 226/2025 repeals section 29 of the Liquor Control and Licensing Regulation (B.C. Reg. 241/2016), removing that provision from the regulatory framework governing liquor licensing in BC.
briefs.action_required: Review your liquor licence obligations to confirm whether repealed section 29 affected your operations or compliance requirements.
